summary: Completed comprehensive end-to-end testing of KBS5 platform (Kubus Teknologi Indonesia). All backend APIs (47/47 tests) and frontend features tested successfully. Platform is fully operational with space-themed UI, bilingual support, and multi-role authentication working correctly.

design_issues.issue: Console warnings about chart width/height being -1. Charts may not render properly on initial load.
design_issues.note: Non-blocking, charts still function but may need container size adjustments
Page loads successfully but some assets are missing

passed_tests: Backend: Health check and root endpoint (2/2)
Backend: Authentication - admin, client, staff login (5/5)
Backend: Public content APIs - services, cases, tech, team, FAQ, packages, legal, resources, home-blocks, settings (10/10)
Backend: Admin endpoints - stats, leads, CMS (9/9)
Backend: Phase 16 Demo Sandbox Engine - session management, KN3 WMS endpoints (11/11)
Backend: Phase 19 CMS collections - testimonials, FAQ, packages, resources, legal (10/10)
Frontend: Public homepage with space theme and navigation
Frontend: All public pages load correctly (services, portfolio, case-studies, products, tech, blog, contact)
Frontend: Admin login and dashboard access
Frontend: Client login and portal dashboard
Frontend: Staff login and admin portal access
